<current_datetime>2026-04-03T02:18:16.271Z</current_datetime>

I want to run only the SmsNotificationTests from this TUnit project. What's the command?

input.initialPrompt: I want to run only the SmsNotificationTests from this TUnit project. What's the command?

data.content:
TUnit uses `--filter` with the `dotnet run` command. To run only `SmsNotificationTests`:

```
dotnet run --project TestProject.csproj --filter "/**/SmsNotificationTests/**"
```

This glob-style filter matches all tests inside the `SmsNotificationTests` class. TUnit runs tests via `dotnet run` (not `dotnet test`), and its filter syntax uses `/**/ClassName/**` to target a specific class.
